fields.remarks:
<format type="text/markdown"><![CDATA[
## Remarks

`SKFourByteTag` is a value type that wraps a 32-bit integer whose bytes
correspond to four ASCII characters. It is commonly used as an axis tag (e.g.,
`wght`, `wdth`) or to identify an OpenType table.

You can create an instance from four characters, a raw `uint`, or by parsing
a string. Implicit conversions to and from `uint` are provided for convenience.

## Examples

```csharp
// Create from characters
var tag = new SKFourByteTag('w', 'g', 'h', 't');

// Create by parsing a string
var tag2 = SKFourByteTag.Parse("wdth");

// Implicit conversion from uint
SKFourByteTag tag3 = 0x77676874u;

Console.WriteLine(tag.ToString()); // "wght"
```
]]></format>
fields.summary: Represents a four-byte tag used to identify font tables, variation axes, and other OpenType constructs.

params.value: The raw 32-bit integer value where each byte represents one ASCII character.

fields.summary: Initializes a new instance of the <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKFourByteTag" /> struct from a raw 32-bit integer.

entries.signature: public SKFourByteTag (char c1, char c2, char c3, char c4);

fields.summary: Initializes a new instance of the <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKFourByteTag" /> struct from four individual characters.

params.other: The instance to compare with the current instance.

fields.returns: <see langword="true" /> if the instances are equal; otherwise, <see langword="false" />.
fields.summary: Determines whether this instance and the specified <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKFourByteTag" /> are equal.

params.obj: The object to compare with the current instance.

fields.returns: <see langword="true" /> if the instances are equal; otherwise, <see langword="false" />.
fields.summary: Determines whether this instance and a specified object are equal.
Returns the hash code for this instance.

entries.signature: public static bool operator == (SkiaSharp.SKFourByteTag left, SkiaSharp.SKFourByteTag right);

fields.returns: <see langword="true" /> if the instances are equal; otherwise, <see langword="false" />.
fields.summary: Returns a value indicating whether two <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKFourByteTag" /> instances are equal.

entries.signature: public static implicit operator uint (SkiaSharp.SKFourByteTag tag);

fields.returns: The 32-bit unsigned integer representation of the tag.
fields.summary: Converts an <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKFourByteTag" /> to its underlying 32-bit unsigned integer value.

entries.signature: public static implicit operator SkiaSharp.SKFourByteTag (uint tag);

fields.returns: An <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKFourByteTag" /> wrapping the specified value.
fields.summary: Converts a 32-bit unsigned integer to an <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKFourByteTag" />.

entries.signature: public static bool operator != (SkiaSharp.SKFourByteTag left, SkiaSharp.SKFourByteTag right);

fields.returns: <see langword="true" /> if the instances are not equal; otherwise, <see langword="false" />.
fields.summary: Returns a value indicating whether two <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKFourByteTag" /> instances are not equal.

params.tag: The string to parse. Only the first four characters are used; shorter strings are padded with spaces.

fields.returns: An <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKFourByteTag" /> whose bytes correspond to the characters of the string.
fields.summary: Parses a string of up to four characters into an <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKFourByteTag" />.

fields.returns: A four-character string where each character corresponds to one byte of the tag value.
fields.summary: Returns the four-character string representation of this tag.
